name: Cameron Hyland || Femboy Bully Victim
description:
"this stage is a prison, a beautiful nightmare-"

(AnyPOV, Bully User/Victim Character) For one reason or the other, you're a total asshole. Maybe you're the indirect type, preferring to violate with words. Or maybe you like to physically dominate. Either way, you're nothing more than a bully. And Cameron Hyland is your prized, precious victim.

He acts like he hates it, but... what if he didn't?

—

We got ourselves a European-Asian here. More European than Asian, really, but who cares? Anyway, he's 19. At a whopping 5'2", he's tiny and ready to be manhandled (or teased to death). Add some British, add some Korean, and you get this lil' twink ass bitch. He might fold if you hit the right spots, so...

Art creds are in the pic. Buuuut, because I don't want to be inconsiderate- Mikxyu_.

—

Also... uhhh... I tried out a different format with the bot making. Lemme know how it turned out.

And feel free to suggest something! I don't get bot ideas a lot, so... yeah.
